channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐍 elementalsouls/Claude-OSINT (1370 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: elementalsouls

📝 Repository: elementalsouls/Claude-OSINT

📄 Descrizione: Two paired Claude skills · 90+ recon modules · 48 secret-regex patterns · 80+ dorks · 9 read-only credential validators · 27 attack-path templates · 5,500+ lines of structured tradecraft.
